name: LAMAR ADVERTISING CO/NEW
business: Lamar Advertising Company is one of the largest outdoor advertising companies in the United States based on number of displays, renting space for advertising on billboards, buses, shelters, benches, logo plates, and in airport terminals. The company manages three operating segments: billboard, logo, and transit advertising. Its tenant base is diverse, with no single tenant accounting for more than 2% of billboard advertising net revenues.
sellsTo: Local businesses (79% of outdoor net revenues)
Service, health care, restaurants, retailers, automotive, and other industries

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, we owned and operated approximately 5,500 digital billboard advertising displays in 43 states and Canada.
We offer a portion of our unsold digital display inventory to advertisers via our programmatic partners.

catalysts.event: Seven logo sign contracts subject to renewal or expiration
catalysts.sentence: Of the Company s 25 logo sign contracts in place at December 31, 2025, seven are subject to renewal or expiration in 2026.
